title: CWSM Enhanced Boss Bars
description: Cracker's Witherstorm mod Enhanced bossbars for Withered Symbiont and Command Block
body:
# Cracker's Witherstorm mod Enhanced boss bars

An addon to Enhanced Boss Bars for more compatibility with Cracker's Witherstorm Mod!

Adds Withered Symbiont bossbar and Command block bossbar.

Put the "CWSM Enhanced Boss Bars" above "Enhanced Boss Bar"
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94cf15c1fa22f43ffcb9f5030e20d24ed8551a58.png)
